column1: Existing XR visualization libraries plus their key properties and links to resources. This table is not exhaustive.

column3: A Unity project to help build high quality, interactive and scalable data visualisations in Immersive Environments
An immersive system for exploring multivariate data using fluid, modeless interaction, based on embodied data axes to be manipulated like physical objects in space.
An immersive data visualization toolkit built on the web-based 3D game engine Babylon.js and WebXR, uses by D3
A web-based authoring system using interactive visual programming without coding expertise to create and modify immersive analytics applications dynamically
A basic framework with 2D and 3D charts (like scatter plots, line charts, pie charts and parallel coordinates) to build extendable and customizable visualizations with AR/VR support.
High-level visualization toolkit for AR/XR with direct manipulation authoring
Web-based middleware for AR/XR/VR rendering; supports DashSpace
A flask server for server-client connection from python-based backend to unreal engine-based frontend
A collection of Blueprint-ready actors for Pie, Bar, and Line charts
To help facilitate advanced Virtual Reality interactions and gameplay elements, such as handling large amounts of meshes
Focuses on the spatial representation of complex behavioral data
